blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,740 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
